description: Tracking of assets, Robust documentation, strong audit trail
author: Bhavin S.
pros: Ease of use, very smooth integration with SAP, user friendly, mobile application
cons: Should be integrated with all leading ERP of currently not integrated

author: Yuvaraj S.
pros: The tracking of the assets and register maintenance is nice, also the application is user-friendly we can learn and work easily.
cons: Plant mapping asks for approval is safe only but work is taking delayed. and in all the option loading time is take dealy.

review_title: Need more enhancement in software once it is updated some old features get disturb
author: Sahil P.
pros: Tagging of an asset, good in tracking process but reporting need to more insightful if possible.
cons: Programming of an report dumps and if any update it get update as per need but old features get disturb and need need takes to time resolve.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: We found it very easy and simple way to manage our fixed assets and also the reconciliation of assets is very helpful for our Finance team
author: Swayam M.
pros: The most impactful feature is Month End Reconciliation which is extensively used by Finance to reconcile the assets from Oracle and Assetcues. The tool is very user friendly and easy to use.
cons: There is a scope of improvement in email notification as sometimes this feature stop working or triggering multiple emails to users.

description: Overall the experience is average. The Teach team is quite supportive and available when required however in terms of timely completion of project and expediting the process there are gaps which should be seriously taken care.
author: Ajay J.
pros: Software is quite exhaustive and caters almost all the requirements of a business. Tagging team is hardworking and is helpful in implementation of the process as a whole.
cons: Few areas are there that can be improved for e.g. Automatic mapping of assets between additional and pending data with a common reference, dashboard can be more interactive. Operations team need to improve on client management and project completion timelines. Further there should be a dedicated customer management team which can cater for all issues and work as one stop contact to the client for all problems related to the project execution and closure.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: kaushik P.
pros: With all of its options, software becomes very dynamic and simple to configure.
cons: As of now, I have not found any disadvantages.

author: Bibin J.
pros: User-Friendly InterfaceEfficient Asset TrackingCustomizable ReportingScalabilityMobile Accessibility
cons: AssetCues lacks a feature for calculating asset depreciation values, which may be a limitation for businesses requiring precise financial reporting and asset valuation.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Asset Cues Software for Asset Tracking & Tagging
description: Overall, Very Good for Companies looking for Asset Tracking & Tagging
author: Chandu C.
pros: Ease to Use ,for Asset Tracking and Tagging , accurate on each step of Asset approval and Tracking status
cons: Suggest upgrading in Data transfer fast.

review_title: Effortlessly Track Your Assets with AssetCues
author: Sagar S.
pros: The best thing about AssetCues is their support team. AssetCues has a responsive and helpful customer support team that is available to address any questions or issues you may have.
cons: This is a great product. Will highly recommend.

author: Padmaja P.
pros: Data from s4 hana to Asset cues is real time .
cons: 1. More dash boards like plant wise asset classification wise in home page.

description: Assets are managed through the cloud, and it is very beneficial for our organization
author: Bala S.
pros: Using the Asset software and maintaining the Asset Tracking is very user friendly, we can manage our assets from our computers.
cons: Assets are managed through the cloud, and it is very beneficial for our organization

review_title: Great tool to Manage your IT Assets
author: Kamlesh Y.
pros: Great solution & easy to use Application. AssetCues is also having a great customer support and onboarding team.
cons: Price might be little on lower side. But as they are having lot many features the price is worth it.

author: Rumana K.
pros: Overall software is very good, and support team is also very helpful
cons: The software is very good , can use daily basis for asset tracking

pros: We are using this software last 2 years and it seems good for tracking the asset.
cons: We are using this software last 2 years and it seems good for tracking the asset.

author: Monark S.
pros: Customer support was excellent. Feature wise product is having very good features.
cons: Nothing as such. Overall product is very good.

author: Krutika B.
pros: The ease & user friendly software for tracking Assets.
cons: We faced lag issue but it was resolved immediately on informing Assetcues

author: Ayush S.
pros: Easy to use, Mobile based Asset Verification
cons: Not as such product is good will lot many features

author: Lokpati V.

author: Mohsin K.

cons: Nothing least in this module, all modules are too much good.

author: Deepen M.
pros: The best part is that it has so many features. with respect to asset management, record management and audit and hence it is all in one and you don't need to depend on multiple software.
cons: Although user interface is easy, it can be improved.

author: Romil C.

author: Khushbu N.
